title: Realistic 3D Book Drops
description: Makes books drop in 3D without physics mods. Lightweight and vanilla!
body:
📘 **Realistic 3D Book Items**

This simple pack replaces all book items (book, written book, enchanted book) with 3D models that drop as realistic objects on the ground — no mods required.

🧊 No more 2D floating icons. Just proper 3D blocks, like real items.

🎮 Vanilla-compatible  
📦 Lightweight  

Looks great when books are dropped, thrown, or used in item frames.

No extra shaders or mods needed. Just plug & play.
